$schema_hint: NIM model tier classification scraped from build.nvidia.com. Persistent reference for fan-out voice selection; intended as first-pass filter (not authoritative — see notes_caveats below).

nim_type_preview.definition: Limited free quota (rate-limited / time-bounded); behavior unstable. Failure mode often: HTTP 200 on short smoke + HTTP 000 (empty body) on real workload — verified for bytedance/seed-oss-36b-instruct (5/5 failures today 2026-05-18).

nim_type_upgrade_available.definition: Enterprise tier. Default HTTP:000 silent drop for free accounts. Verified today for deepseek-v4-pro/flash, qwen3-next-80b-*, google/gemma-4-31b-it.

notes_caveats: Tier classification is a signal, NOT authoritative for free availability. Today's evidence: qwen/qwen3.5-397b-a17b is in upgrade_available but worked multiple times today; meta/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct is in preview but completed a full audit. Possible explanations: limited free quota with rate limit, transitional grace period, time-of-day variance.

Conversely, bytedance/seed-oss-36b-instruct passed short smoke-pings 5 times today but failed all 5 real-workload calls (empty body → JSON parse error). Smoke-ping at 3-token output is too small to discriminate from rate-limited tiers.

Build.nvidia.com is SPA; data is fetched via JS, not embedded in initial HTML. Scraping requires headless browser (this snapshot used mcp__Claude_in_Chrome__ Chrome extension). Re-scrape monthly or after observed regression.

Both lists overlap on 5 models (preview ∩ upgrade_available): qwen3-coder-480b-a35b-instruct, mistral-large-3-675b-instruct-2512, stepfun-ai/step-3.5-flash, minimaxai/minimax-m2.7, nvidia/llama-3_1-nemotron-safety-guard-8b-v3.
recommended_usage_protocol: 2. Filter OUT this blacklist_union_unique → trusted-free pool (~82 models).

3. For each fan-out, do a REAL-WORKLOAD smoke (80-100 token output, prompt size similar to actual audit) on candidate voices BEFORE committing to fan-out — catches the seed-oss-style 'smoke OK + real fail' pattern that 3-token ping misses.
4. Re-scrape this map monthly OR after any unexpected voice failure pattern not explained by current data.
